headline: Anthropic's Mythos model family launched with Fable 5 driving a wave of autonomous task demonstrations.
body: Anthropic released the Mythos family with Fable 5 (Mythos 5 with guardrails) as a generally available option, bundled at no extra cost across Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22 before usage shifts to credits. Demonstrations showed Fable 5 autonomously playing Factorio, simulating the solar system to predict a solar eclipse from physics first principles, synchronizing a fluid simulation to a Beethoven remix, and designing a 3D-printable model inside a CAD editor it built itself. On the technique side, attribution and filter propagation broke out as leading movers, while software engineering, percolation, throughput scaling, CPU offloading, Untied Ulysses, and view synthesis entered as new entrants. Separately, RunPod showed IDE-to-GPU-cloud deployment via a single decorator, and a Turbopuffer talk reframed RAG as a broader iterative retrieval paradigm rather than vector search alone.

cited_items.title: Claude Fable + Mythos 5 Are Live & The Numbers are INSANE
